name: Umbrage | Dark Medieval Fantasy RPG
description:
Welcome to Umbrage! A Dark Medieval Fantasy Land! Choose how you start and live your life in this pretty average dark medieval fantasy rpg. You could be an orc living in an orc camp, a loyal knight under a king, or cause chaos as a feared and powerful mage, perhaps grow stronger than the warlocks of old? Includes most conventionally thought magics; Fire, Time, Dark and even Nihil magic!

Version 1

Expect an update atleast every week or so. It could be longer depending on what I feel like doing at that moment. I plan on developing this hopefully into a atleast creative world, it will still use most common fantasy things though. But what I mean is that I will try create completely new monsters, magic, places, weapons and armour.
creator: DaveTheGooner
